lsp.justification: The answer finds the correct `struct redisObject` definition and notes both `robj` and `kvobj` are typedef aliases, then correctly identifies `refcount`, `OBJ_SHARED_REFCOUNT`, `OBJ_STATIC_REFCOUNT`, `OBJ_FIRST_SPECIAL_REFCOUNT`, and the `iskvobj` free-path distinction. It adds some extra discussion of `type`/`encoding` and has a questionable comment on `lru`, but it explicitly does not treat `lru` as refcount-governing and covers all GT scoring requirements.
